name: Avocado Cilantro Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the scallions, cilantro and garlic. Process until finely chopped.
2. Add the avocado to the food processor and process until smooth.
3. Add the yogurt, buttermilk, 1/4 cup water, lime juice, curry powder and red pepper to the food processor. Process until smooth.
4. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour, until well chilled. Each half-cup serving contains 115 calories, 5 gm fat, 104 mg sodium and 3 mg cholesterol.
